title: Jai Ganesha
subTitle: When Lord Shiva beheads Lord Ganesha, unaware of the fact that he is his son, Goddess Parvati asks Shiva to resurrect him. Later, Lord Ganesha is then renamed Vighnaharta, the remover of obstacles.
